sourceOfTruthPolicy: code > maps > markdown > task pack summary

invalidationRules: invalidate when route files, backend support files, schema files, or analysis mode change
invalidate when schema files, backend support files, frontend screens, or route-to-model map change
invalidate when entrypoints, routes, entity usage, or risk zones change
invalidate when frontend screens/components or route files change
invalidate when auth, billing, admin, migration, PDF, or AI integration files change

reasons: Auth-sensitive flows exist or auth inference appears in route contracts.
Billing or payment-like areas are expensive to break.
Admin surfaces often have elevated blast radius.
Schema or migration files imply persistent data risk.
PDF generation/export code is often brittle and user-visible.
AI integrations usually depend on external APIs and prompt assumptions.

invalidationRules: invalidate when route/entity usage links change
invalidate when docs or structured maps change
